scope: Module 1 and Module 2 evidence, migration pattern decision
entry_criteria: Baseline app evidence and dependency inventory exist
key_activities: Review discovery findings; approve migration pattern; confirm open questions
exit_criteria: Recommended pattern and ADR log approved

scope: Spring Boot app, Maven build, package dependencies, container packaging
entry_criteria: Source builds locally; package dependencies known
key_activities: Create production Dockerfile; define image tagging; define build-time egress; prepare ACR integration
exit_criteria: Container image can be built repeatably and scanned

scope: H2/PostgreSQL/MySQL profiles and database network flows
entry_criteria: Active DB engine confirmed; downtime tolerance identified
key_activities: Select managed DB target; define schema/data validation; externalize connection strings
exit_criteria: Database target decision and validation plan approved

scope: Azure Container Apps target deployment and health endpoint
entry_criteria: Container image, target IaC and secrets approach ready
key_activities: Deploy app to Azure Container Apps; configure ingress; configure health checks; connect to target DB

scope: Ingress, egress, DNS, TLS, secrets and unknown flow validation
entry_criteria: App and DB target deployed in non-prod
key_activities: Validate TCP 8443; validate SMTP-like flow; create egress allowlist; configure DNS/TLS; lock down secrets
exit_criteria: Network controls approved and no unresolved P1 dependency blockers

scope: Production cutover, validation, rollback and monitoring
entry_criteria: Smoke tests, rollback plan and owners ready
key_activities: Freeze writes if needed; switch DNS/config; run smoke tests; monitor health; start hypercare
exit_criteria: Cutover signed off and hypercare active
